items.title: Stannaries Act 1836
items.description: An Act to make provision for the better and more expeditious Administration of Justice in the Stannaries of Cornwall, and for the enlarging the Jurisdiction and improving the Practice and Proceedings in the Courts of the said Stannaries.

items.title: Ecclesiastical Leases Act 1836 (repealed)
items.description: An Act for imposing certain Restrictions on the Renewal of Leases by Ecclesiastical Persons.

items.title: Erasures in Deeds (Scotland) Act 1836
items.description: An Act to amend and regulate the law of Scotland as to erasures in instruments of sasine and of resignation ad remanentiam.

items.title: Entail Powers Act 1836 (repealed)
items.description: An Act to grant certain powers to heirs of entail in Scotland, and to authorize the sale of entailed lands for the payment of certain debts affecting the same.

items.title: Ecclesiastical Leases (Amendment) Act 1836 (repealed)
items.description: An Act to explain and amend an Act passed in this present Session of Parliament for imposing certain Restrictions on the Renewal of Leases by Ecclesiastical Persons.

items.title: Tithe Act 1836
items.description: An Act for the commutation of tithes in England and Wales.

items.title: Ecclesiastical Commissioners Act 1836 (repealed)
items.description: An Act for carrying into Effect the Reports of the Commissioners appointed to consider the State of the Established Church in England and Wales, with reference to Ecclesiastical Duties and Revenues, so far as they relate to Episcopal Dioceses, Revenues, and Patronage.
